flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Ashford University rose 27% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.8k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Ashford University are 6% above 6-year earnings ($33.4k → $35.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Ashford University rose 1150% between 2006 and 2009 (3.4k → 42.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Ashford University rose 220% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 2.7%).
